description: Legal document (שהדותא. . . .). Apparently a declaration made by Ḥisday ha-Sar. Mentioning Ibn al-Kāzarūnī and 50 or [.]50 dinars. T-S NS 310.77 (PGPID 25298) and T-S AS 151.108 (PGPID 17649) are probably related. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
